source_jobs.title: Remote Dermatologist (MD/DO) - Florida
source_jobs.description:
About Us:

Honeydew is on a mission to make high-quality, accessible, and affordable skincare available to everyone. We provide personalized care and evidence-based solutions to meet the diverse needs of our patients. Join us in reshaping dermatological care with a compassionate and patient-centered approach.

Job Description:

Honeydew is seeking a dedicated and experienced Dermatologist with a valid US license (must be able to practice in Florida) to join our remote care team. You’ll play a critical role in delivering virtual dermatology consultations, guiding patients on their skincare journeys, and providing expert advice to meet their needs.

Responsibilities:

 - Through telemedicine, conduct video consultations and message with patients, including assessing, screening, diagnosing, and prescribing medication for patients as necessary

 - Work in close conjunction with other board-certified dermatologists and other members of the care team

 - Adhere to Honeydew guidelines and complete all required compliance and clinical training

 - Handle patient care by answering patient clinical questions, prescribing medication as appropriate, and providing medical guidance as necessary

 - Have the opportunity to provide clinical care for a variety of dermatology conditions, including acne, rosacea, and eczema

Requirements:

 - Active MD or DO license with the ability to practice in Florida

 - Board Certified in Dermatology

 - Minimum time commitment of 15 hrs per week (preferred) with availability during evenings and weekends

 - 1+ years of experience in a dedicated dermatology practice

 - Excellent written and verbal communication with an emphasis on clarity and compassion

 - Confidence in treating full-spectrum patients with dermatology needs, including experience prescribing a variety of medications such as tretinoin, oral antibiotics, spironolactone, and isotretinoin (accutane)

Job Types:
Part-time, Contract

Benefits:

 - Flexible schedule (choose your own hours weekly) with a strong need for evening and weekend coverage

 - Work from anywhere!

 - Dedicated support team available 24/7

 - Best-in-class colleagues committed to helping our amazing patients

source_jobs.title: Director of Integrated Search
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HONEYDEW 👋

No one should suffer from a treatable skin disease because they couldn’t access care. That’s what Honeydew http://honeydew.com is fixing — a platform connecting hundreds of millions of people to licensed dermatologists, FDA-approved treatments, and ongoing skin health support. We’ve helped 40,000+ patients get life-changing results, we’re growing 5x YoY, and we’re just getting started.


OPPORTUNITY 📈

Search is no longer a single channel. A patient researching “best treatment for cystic acne” might ask ChatGPT, click a Google result, or get served a paid ad — sometimes all three in the same session. We want Honeydew winning all of it.

We’re looking for a Director of Integrated Search to unite our entire search acquisition surface: organic SEO, AI search visibility (AEO/GEO), and paid search.

You’ll report directly to Honeydew’s Head of Growth Connor Kreutz https://www.linkedin.com/in/connorkreutz/, and you’ll work with our rockstar paid search lead, who’s driving paid search forward today.

This is a high-ownership, high-autonomy role. You’ll join paid and organic search programs performing strongly, and you’ll bring them to the next level. The right person thinks about search psychologically, not just mechanically: understanding what someone is really asking when they type a query, and building the architecture to meet them there across every surface.

You’re the right person if you:

 - Think in systems – you see how organic authority, paid signals, and AI citations reinforce each other, and you can scale that system to support acquisition goals

 - Have genuine intuition about search intent – the psychology behind a query, not just its volume. You think about the holistic patient journey for folks who find Honeydew through these channels.

 - Can work with a talented paid search lead and build a high-performance team over the long-run

 - Move fast and own outcomes – you don’t need a big team or a perfect brief to create leverage

 - Translate search performance into business impact – signups and revenue





WHAT YOU’LL DO


ORGANIC SEARCH (SEO)

 - Own and execute Honeydew’s organic search strategy end-to-end — from technical infrastructure to content architecture to link authority

 - Build topical authority frameworks in dermatology, skincare, and telehealth that compound over time

 - Drive large-scale content production: briefing, AI-assisted drafting, editing, publishing, and ongoing optimization

 - Conduct competitive analysis and keyword research with a focus on high-intent, acquisition-driving queries

 - Partner with engineering on site speed, Core Web Vitals, structured data, and crawlability

 - Own technical SEO hygiene: schema markup, JSON-LD, canonicalization, indexation, and internal linking architecture


AI SEARCH VISIBILITY (AEO/GEO)

 - Lead Honeydew’s strategy for showing up in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews, and emerging platforms

 - Structure content to be LLM-friendly: passage-level optimization, conversational formatting, semantically rich answer blocks

 - Build and own AI citation tracking and reporting – establish baselines, set targets, iterate

 - Test content formats, structures, and distribution approaches that improve citation rates across AI surfaces

 - Drive earned media and backlink strategy that builds the domain authority and off-site presence LLMs reward

 - Stay ahead of how agentic AI and ambient search are reshaping patient discovery behavior in healthcare


PAID SEARCH (SEM)

 - Partner with our Growth Lead https://www.linkedin.com/in/zyanyaotal/ who owns paid search today – support setting priorities and be a sounding board for strategy

 - Contribute to strategy setting across ~$500K+/month in paid search spend on Google and eventually Bing

 - Own the integration between paid and organic: ensure keyword strategy, landing pages, and messaging are coherent across both channels

 - Be fluent enough in paid searc

source_jobs.title: Controller
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION 💪

No one should suffer from a treatable skin disease because they couldn't access care. That's what Honeydew is fixing — a platform connecting hundreds of millions of people to licensed dermatologists, FDA-approved treatments, and ongoing skin health support. We've helped 40,000+ patients get life-changing results, we're growing 5x YoY, and we're just getting started.




THE OPPORTUNITY 📈

Honeydew is moving into its next phase of maturity, and we are bringing our accounting function in-house. We need a founding accounting leader—a "player-coach" who is ready to build a world-class organization from the ground up. You aren't just managing a ledger; you are architecting the systems, automation, and AI-native workflows that will allow us to scale 10x without 10x-ing the headcount.




WHAT YOU’LL BUILD (YOUR FIRST 6 MONTHS) 🛠️

At Honeydew, we focus on outcomes over activities. In your first 180 days, you will be the driving force behind these three key milestones:

 1. Modernize the Stack: Run the RFP and implementation for a new, AI-native ERP, integrating it with our entire modern finance stack (Brex, Stripe, Bill.com http://Bill.com, etc.).

 2. Bring Accounting In-House: Successfully transition our full accounting function from our outsourced firm to your internal ownership utilizing our new finance stack.

 3. The 10-Day Close: Re-engineer our processes and data integrations to reduce the monthly close to Business Day 10 and then build a path to Business Day 5 or better.


HOW YOU’LL MAKE AN IMPACT

 - System & Process Architecture: Build and execute accounting processes through heavy automation, moving us away from manual entries and toward real-time financial visibility.

 - Technical Ownership: Own the results of the people, processes, and systems, ensuring revenue recognition and GAAP policies are impeccable.

 - AI Integration: Treat AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) as part of your daily operating environment, finding new ways to automate reconciliations, flux analysis, and all accounting workflows.

 - Strategic Partnership: Act as a true business partner to the CEO, CFO, and the full leadership team using financial insights to help Honeydew make better and faster decisions.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

The Non-Negotiables:

 - Venture-Backed Experience: 10+ years of accounting experience, with at least 4 years owning the close at a high-growth, venture-backed startup.

 - Modern Stack Mastery: You have personally implemented or operated an AI-native ERP and are comfortable navigating Brex, Bill.com http://Bill.com, Stripe, Justworks, and QBO.

 - The "Builder" DNA: You have a genuine appetite for hands-on work. This is not a role for someone who wants to delegate the close; it’s for someone who wants to do it, automate it, and then teach the next person how to run it.

 - Inquisitive Ownership: You keep digging until the numbers make sense. You dot every "i" and cross every "t," but never lose sight of the "so what" behind the data.

The Nice-to-Haves:

 - CPA & Big 4: A CPA is strongly preferred, and a Big 4 background is a major plus.

 - Industry Context: Experience in healthcare (telehealth), DTC subscriptions, or operating across multiple legal entities (including PC structures).

 - Audit Prep: You’ve successfully prepared a startup for its first institutional audit.

 


WHY HONEYDEW?

 - Real Ownership: We don't micromanage builders; we give you the tools and the autonomy to build a department from scratch.

 - AI-First Culture: We don't fear AI; we experiment with it. You'll be encouraged to push the boundaries of what is possible in modern accounting.

 - Total Rewards:
   
   - Full remote flexibility
   
   - Health Insurance + HSA Match
   
   - 401(k) Retirement Savings + Employer Match
   
   - Unlimited PTO
   
   - $100 Monthly Tech Stipend
   
   - Free Honeydew Membership & product discounts

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION 💪

No one should suffer from a treatable skin disease because they couldn't access care. That's what Honeydew https://www.honeydew.com/ is fixing — a platform connecting hundreds of millions of people to licensed dermatologists, FDA-approved treatments, and ongoing skin health support. We've helped 40,000+ patients get life-changing results, we're growing 5x YoY, and we're just getting started.




THE OPPORTUNITY 📈

We're hiring a Senior Product Designer to join Honeydew’s talented and growing Design team. This is a full ownership role, as you'll take design problems from first principles through to final specs.

What You'll Do

 - Own product areas end-to-end: problem framing, flows, wireframes, and prototypes

 - Build and maintain a design system that scales as the product grows

 - Work closely with Product and Engineering throughout the build process

 - Run lightweight research and usability testing to validate direction

 - Contribute design output that informs both engineering and broader product decisions

What We're Looking For

 - Experience with end-to-end ownership — you understood the problem, drove the solution, and saw it through to delivery

 - Strong systems thinking: design systems, component libraries, or work that demonstrates consistency at scale

 - Strong ability to lead Design Reviews, clearly articulating complex UX ideas and getting the right feedback

 - Startup experience where you've had to create structure from scratch

 - Recent experience using AI-assisted tools where they genuinely add speed or quality

 - Experience in healthcare and/or e-commerce a plus


YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF…

 - You love rolling up your sleeves and building from the ground up

 - You love talking to people and being curious about their journey

 - You care about finding the right match and best outcome

 - You are empathetic, driven, and operate with high integrity

 - You believe healthcare should be accessible to everyone, not just the privileged few

 - You find joy in doing work that matters




WHAT YOU GET

 - Direct impact you can measure

 - Ability to grow within the company

 - $100 monthly tech stipend

 - Free Honeydew membership

 - Direct access to new dermatology treatments

 - 20% off Honeydew products

 - Bi-monthly get togethers

 - Peer-to-peer recognition through Motivosity

 - Health insurance & HSA match

 - 401(k) retirement savings with employer match

 - Unlimited time off



NYC Hybrid or Remote: While we love the energy of our West Village office, we are an outcome-focused culture. We're looking for the best person for the job, whether you’re in New York or working remotely.
The target base salary for this role is $166,000 – $179,000. Final offers are calibrated based on your specific skill set, depth of experience, and geographic location.

source_jobs.title: General
source_jobs.description:
If you think you would be a great addition to our team but don't see the right role for you listed, use this to send us your info and tell us how you can contribute!




MISSION 💪

Our mission is to ensure that no one in the world has to suffer from a treatable skin disease because of an access issue ever again.




ABOUT HONEYDEW 👋

Honeydew https://honeydewcare.com is building an operating system for hundreds of millions of people globally to access expertise and science-backed skin treatments, from prescription to retail.

Our tech-forward dermatology experience helps people with chronic skin conditions access licensed specialists, FDA-approved treatment, and ongoing support in record time (24 hours vs an industry average of 6 months).

Honeydew is the future of skin health — digitally native, scientifically rooted, integrated end-to-end (evaluation + treatments + lab tests), and powered by AI.




STAGE 🚀

Since launching, Honeydew has helped 20,000+ people achieve life-changing results with a 5-star rating, and we are growing 5x YoY. We are bringing on our first People leader to help support our team as we scale.

Honeydew is backed by Footwork VC https://www.footwork.vc/, Rex Woodbury https://www.linkedin.com/in/rexwoodbury/ (Daybreak VC), and top-tier angels like Jeff Nadler https://www.linkedin.com/in/nadlerjeff/ (Teladoc), Max Mullen https://www.linkedin.com/in/maxmullen/ (Instacart), Brent Saunders https://www.linkedin.com/in/brentlsaunders/ (Allergan), Cory Levy https://twitter.com/cory (Z fellows), and Adam Guild https://www.linkedin.com/in/adamharrisonguild/ (Owner).




FOUNDERS ⭐

Honeydew was started by David Futoran https://linkedin.com/in/david-futoran (Wharton) and the dermatologist who cleared his skin, Joel Spitz, MD https://www.linkedin.com/in/joel-spitz-b657982/ (Princeton, Columbia), after David spent years struggling to access care.

source_jobs.title: Director of Physical Products
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HONEYDEW 👋

No one should suffer from a treatable skin disease because they couldn't access care. That's what Honeydew https://www.honeydew.com/ is fixing — a platform connecting hundreds of millions of people to licensed dermatologists, FDA-approved treatments, and ongoing skin health support. We've helped 40,000+ patients get life-changing results, we're growing 5x YoY, and we're just getting started.




THE OPPORTUNITY 📈

We are redefining how Americans access dermatology care. As the Director of Physical Products, you will lead the end-to-end lifecycle of every physical product we bring to market. This is a high-impact, "player-coach" leadership role owning everything from CPG supply chain optimization to the launch of revolutionary, first-to-market custom prescription products.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 1. Launch New Products: Own the end-to-end commercialization of our flagship clinical innovations.

 2. Optimize the CPG Stack: Take over our current supply chain and repackage existing OTC products to be market-competitive and brand-forward.

 3. Scale the Portfolio: Launch additional OTC products from inception to availability.


YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Launch Leadership: Own the roadmap for OTC and compounded Rx products. Lead cross-functional workstreams across R&D, legal, and growth.

 - Supply Chain Ownership: Manage full-cycle sourcing, CMO partnerships, and logistics. Negotiate pricing, MOQs, and quality agreements.

 - Forecasting & S&OP: Own demand planning and inventory health. Partner with Finance to align production with high-growth sales targets.

 - Packaging & Compliance: Drive structural design and materials selection while ensuring strict FDA/OTC labeling compliance.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

The Non-Negotiables:

 - 7–12+ years of CPG product management or physical product leadership, with a strong focus on skincare, personal care, or consumables.

 - Demonstrated track record of bringing multiple consumer products to market: owning the full launch cycle from concept through retail/e-commerce availability.

 - Industry relationships and deep expertise in supply chain ownership: manufacturing partnerships, sourcing, logistics, and vendor negotiations.

 - Hands-on experience with demand forecasting, inventory planning, and S&OP in a product company.

 - Strong command of packaging development - both structural and regulatory - including labeling compliance for OTC or regulated products.

 - Experience developing product positioning and go-to-market strategy in collaboration with marketing and commercial teams.


THE NICE-TO-HAVES:

 - Experience in compounded prescription, pharmaceutical, or OTC drug product development and commercialization.

 - Background working with first-to-market or category-creating products; experience launching compounded medications or navigating 503A/503B compounding pharmacy relationships is a strong plus.

 - Familiarity with FDA regulatory frameworks for compounded drugs, cosmetics, OTC drugs, and/or dietary supplements.

 - Experience at a high-growth startup or brand transitioning from startup to scale.

 - Working knowledge of clinical testing protocols, stability studies, and efficacy validation in the context of consumer products.


YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU ARE:

 - A builder. You’re energized by creating things from scratch and have the scar tissue to prove it.

 - An operator. You hold high standards for execution and you hold your partners to them too - timelines, cost targets, quality specs.

 - A systems thinker. You see how supply chain decisions affect margin, how forecasting affects customer experience, and how packaging decisions affect brand.

 - A collaborator. You work seamlessly across functions - finance, marketing, regulatory, creative - and you earn trust at every level.

 - Consumer-obsessed. You understand that every product decision ultimately shows up in the hands of a real person, and you never lose sight of that.




WHY HONEYDEW?

 - Lea

notes: Honeydew is a healthcare company with a small tech team, mostly focused on product and design roles.
